task: Fix macOS SSL certificate verification error in Discord webhook client and ensure multi-project setup with separate tracking
discussion_summary: Friend encountered SSL certificate verification failure on macOS when Discord webhook tried to send notifications. Root cause: Python on macOS doesn't use system certificates by default. Solution implemented: added `certifi` library to provide proper SSL context for both `send_message` and `send_file` methods in discord.py. User confirmed that `askr init` in a new repo will prompt for Anthropic key and webhook URL again, enabling separate tracking for private vs official projects as required.

accomplishments.what: Fixed SSL certificate verification in discord.py by adding certifi SSL context to urllib requests
Committed changes to discord.py and requirements.txt with git
Verified that askr init prompts for credentials per-repo, enabling multi-project separation

next_actions.action: Friend runs `git pull` to fetch the certifi fix and updated requirements.txt
next_actions.why: Pulls the SSL certificate fix into their local repo

next_actions.action: Friend runs `install.sh` to reinstall dependencies and pick up certifi into the venv
next_actions.why: install.sh runs pip install -r requirements.txt which will install certifi automatically

next_actions.action: Friend runs `askr init` in the new repo to set up Anthropic key and Discord webhook URL separately
next_actions.why: Enables separate tracking for private projects vs official projects with distinct credentials

next_actions.action: Test Discord notification by triggering a session to verify SSL error is resolved
next_actions.why: Confirms the certifi fix resolves the [SSL: CERTIFICATE_VERIFY_FAILED] error

decisions.decision: Use certifi library for SSL context instead of disabling certificate verification
decisions.reason: Secure approach that respects certificate validation while providing macOS Python with proper certificate bundle

decisions.decision: Apply certifi fix to both send_message and send_file methods in discord.py
decisions.reason: Both methods use urllib and both can encounter SSL verification failures

relational_files.why: Uses discord client to send notifications
Runs pip install -r requirements.txt to install certifi
